Import TensorFlow and the syntaxnet module from graph_builder_test.py
Define a batch size of 10 for MNIST data
Load MNIST training data with images of shape (28, 28) and labels one-hot encoded with 10 classes
Set hyperparameters: embedding_sizes=[8, 8, 8], hidden_layer_sizes=[32, 32], seed=42, gate_gradients=True, use_averaging=True
Create a TensorFlow session for model training
Initialize graph and parser using syntaxnet.GreedyParser with the defined hyperparameters
Add MNIST training data to parser using batch_size=10 and corpus_name='mnist'
Run one epoch of training by calling train_op in parser.training dictionary
Retrieve loss from parser.training['cost'] after running training for one epoch
Assert that the retrieved loss contains NaN values
Monitor GPU memory usage during model initialization and first training step
Assert that the GPU memory consumption is greater than 10GB
